145.reason: [The original code used 'link[i]' which is incorrect because 'i' is not defined in this scope and does not refer to the current vertex; it should be 'link[q->adj]' to correctly reference the adjacency list of the neighbor vertex.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code used 'link[i]' which is incorrect because 'i' is not defined in this scope and does not refer to the current vertex; it should be 'link[q->adj]' to correctly reference the adjacency list of the neighbor vertex.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code used 'link[i]' which is incorrect because 'i' is not the current vertex; it should be 'link[q->adj]' to refer to the adjacency list of the neighbor vertex]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Here 'i' is used but it's uninitialized in this scope (last value from previous loop is n). Should be 'q->adj' instead of 'i'.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code incorrectly used 'link[i]' instead of 'link[q->adj]'; 'i' is not the correct index here and may be out of bounds or unrelated]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code used 'link[i]' where 'i' is uninitialized in this scope; it should be 'link[q->adj]' to correctly reference the head of the adjacency list for vertex q->adj]

14.reason: [The inner loop condition should be q != NULL, not q->next != NULL, otherwise the last element is never compared. Also, if head is NULL or has only one node, this causes undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [The inner loop condition should be q != NULL, not q->next != NULL, otherwise the last element is never compared. Also, if head is NULL or has only one node, this causes undefined behavior.]

69.reason: [Traversal should always start from vertex 0 as per problem requirement, but this loop starts DFS from every unvisited vertex. This violates requirement #3.]
